creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #12)

As I said, sorry my first message came out much more aggressive than intended. If you felt attacked or offended, sorry, I did not mean anything like that!

> Just build without errors again in poudriere 13.3 amd64.
> libv4l-1.23.0_4 installed as dependency ffmpeg - option FFMPEG is default on.

Maybe it depends on what is enabled in FFMPEG too, I admit I did not dig too much in it. Anyway even if this depends on non default options, it would become an hidden dependency, it needs to be explicit in the Makefile.

> I discussed this with my former mentor (arrowd) several months ago and he said > use LIB_DEPENDS is incorrect and it must be BUILD_DEPENDS + RUN_DEPENDS.

I do agree, but unluckily the tree if full of improper LIB_DEPENDS, even in many USES files. We need to account for those in our commits as long as they exist.

I do not like those warnings either.

BTW sometimes such improper LIB_DEPENDS in USES files are needed, since at least some of the software requiring it DO link to the library, while others do not. It is not easy to distinguish (I am guilty of this in the xfce.mk file)
